## Validation

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`

## Release Notes

- [ ] Requires deploy
- [ ] Requires secret/config change
- [ ] Requires data migration

## Review

- Automated review bots are triggered on PR events.
- If this is the first bootstrap PR or a bot missed the event, add:
  - `@coderabbitai review`
  - `@sourcery-ai review`
  - `@cubic-dev-ai review this PR`
